description: Conference day 1 vs day 2 - multi-day event different days - should NOT match

content_parts.text:
You are comparing calendar events to detect duplicates.

**New Event:**
- Title: DevOps Summit - Day 2
- Start: 2026-10-16T09:00:00
- End: 2026-10-16T18:00:00
- Location: Convention Center, Hall B
- Description: Second day of DevOps Summit. Featured talks on Kubernetes and CI/CD pipelines.

**Existing Events (same date):**

1. Event ID: event-001
   - Title: DevOps Summit - Day 1
   - Start: 2026-10-15T09:00:00
   - End: 2026-10-15T18:00:00
   - Location: Convention Center, Hall B
   - Description: Opening day of DevOps Summit with keynote speakers

2. Event ID: event-002
   - Title: Flight Home
   - Start: 2026-10-17T14:30:00
   - End: 2026-10-17T17:15:00
   - Location: Airport
   - Description: Return flight after conference

3. Event ID: event-003
   - Title: Networking Dinner
   - Start: 2026-10-16T19:00:00
   - End: 2026-10-16T22:00:00
   - Location: The Waterfront Restaurant
   - Description: Evening networking event for DevOps Summit attendees

**Question:** Is the new event the same as any of the existing events?

Consider events the same if they refer to the same real-world event, even if:
- Wording is slightly different
- One has more details than the other
- Time changed slightly (updates)

Return the matching Event ID (or null if no match) and brief reasoning.
